message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F3F3F3
  BorderColor #333333
}

class TicTacToe {
  - turn : Turn
  - board : Board
  - players : Player[] [0..*]
  --
  + TicTacToe()
  + Play()
}

class Board {
  + <u>Color : char[,] [0..*] = {'x', 'o'}</u>
  --
  - tokens : char[,] [0..*]
  --
  + Board()
  --
  + IsTicTacToe() : bool
  - IsTicTacToe(token : char) : bool
  + IsComplete() : bool
  - IsTileEmpty(row : int, column : int) : bool
  - IsTileFull(row : int, column : int) : bool
  --
  + ToString() : string
}

class Player {
  # color : char
  --
  + Player(i: int)
  + Put(board : Board)
  + Move(board : Board)
  + Win()
}

class Turn {
  # value : int = 0
  --
  + Turn()
  + Current() <<Take>>
  + Next() <<NotTake>>
  + Change()
}

class IO <<static>> {
  --
  + <u>ReadString(title : string) : string</u>
  + <u>ReadInt(title : string) : int</u>
  --
  + <u>Write(title : string)</u>
  + <u>WriteLn()</u>
  + <u>WriteError(format : string)</u>
}

TicTacToe --> Board
TicTacToe --> Player
TicTacToe --> Turn

Board ..> IO
Player ..> IO
@enduml
